reference: Hi, I have been suffering from acne vulgaris for many days, and it reduced after using some medications. However, somehow it has started again. The main thing is that I have my marriage in twenty days, and I am using Azithromycin five hundred milligrams as suggested by my doctor. I hope this will work well in a few days. Do you have any suggestions regarding this?
text: How can you talk to your neighbor if you really suspect he cannot listen?
